interactions.summary: The host adds more Peter Thiel context and then asks Jiang to tie the bow on the Middle East and World War III sequence in the immediate future.
Jiang predicts a Levant-centered World War III with the Al-Aqsa Mosque blown up, an American invasion of Iran, and an eventual American humiliation that triggers domestic civil conflict.
The host restates Jiang's image of Israel as protected and constrained by the American empire, a golden cage that may need to be broken.

speaker_notes.note: The focus packet includes a severely damaged fragment that appears to be leftover host context rather than a new substantive claim.

claims.claim: Jiang predicts World War III will be centered in the Levant and Anatolia because that geography matches biblical eschatology.
Jiang predicts the Al-Aqsa Mosque will be blown up as one of the major shocks in the coming escalation.
Jiang predicts the United States will send ground troops into Iran, suffer a humiliating defeat, and thereby provoke civil conflict at home.
Jiang says one eschatological goal is to remove the United States from Middle East affairs by provoking it into an unpopular Iran war that destabilizes the country internally.

signature_moments.moment: The way to free the Middle East script is to bait America into its own humiliation and civil war.
signature_moments.source_phrase: Remove the United States from the equation.
signature_moments.why_it_matters: This is one of Jiang's clearest links between foreign war and domestic regime crisis.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: The host's phrase, endorsed by Jiang's prior logic, for Israel's condition of being lavishly supported yet strategically constrained by the United States.

uncertainty_notes.note: The World War III answer includes severe ASR damage in the middle of the sequence; the extracted claims rely on the clearly legible predictions surrounding the damaged fragment.
